Localization.Description: Attempt was made to set Directory Services Restore Mode administrator password

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed the Directory Services Restore Mode administrator password on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed changing the Directory Services Restore Mode administrator password on host {event_src.host}
